notes: NCR commercial multiprocessor server line; basis for Open OLTP/Teradata-class workloads
Two-per-board configuration; up to eight CPUs per cabinet; ~320 MIPS aggregate
Eight primary slots plus eight optional slots in NCR 3000 cabinet
14 full-height or 28 half-height hot-pluggable fixed disks; 6.75-inch hot-pluggable fans
Internal SCSI cabling for fixed disks and removable devices
Optional removable backup media in NCR 3000 spec
Standard removable backup media in NCR 3000 spec
